levelList.name: 硬血猛匝

levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]強度不低于5級，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的硬化血液 層数不低于3層且本技能的硬幣帯有施加[Burst]的效果，則額外使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加2級[Laceration]強度

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[Laceration]，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層硬化血液

levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有5層慶典的熱潮 或<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有6級[Laceration]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加15級[Laceration]強度并立即触発<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]1次，随后使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]層数減少1層

levelList.name: 一起快樂地唱起歌叭！
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[FestivalFever]層数不低于5層，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]強度不低于6級，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1

levelList.name: 永遠的幸福王国拉·曼却領！
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若[BloodDinner]低于40層，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加20級[Laceration]強度并対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加2層[Laceration]，立即触発<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]2次，随后使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]層数減少2層
[EndSkill] 消耗40層[BloodDinner]
[EndBattle] 消耗所有[HardenedBlood]和[FestivalFever]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 根据<color=#ffffff>自身</color>帯有的[HardenedBlood]層数，使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加相應的[Laceration]強度与[Burst]強度
[OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限(<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[FestivalFever]層数×4)%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>(最多40%)

levelList.name: 閃避
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的慶典的熱潮 層数不低于5層，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+2
[StartBattle] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得3層慶典的熱潮 
[OnDefeatEvade] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>失去3層慶典的熱潮
